name: Bow Ties W/sausage, Tomatoes & Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 can Italian plum tomatoes (drained and coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add sausage and pepper flakes. Cook until sausage is no longer pink, stirring frequently, about 7 minutes.
3. Add onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until onion is tender and sausage is light brown, stirring occasionally, about 7 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes, cream, and salt. Simmer until mixture thickens slightly, about 4 minutes.
5. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
6. Drain pasta.
Serves 4.
